gauge.name: Black Warrior River at Holt Lock and Dam

impacts.statement: Significant industrial flooded occurs in the vicinity of Warrior Road and Reichold Road at 157 feet and higher stages.
Industrial property in the vicinity of Warrior Road and Reichold road begins to flood as Warrior River continues to rise.
Some minor flooding of low-lying areas occurs.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
